title: coeloglossum viride subsp. islandicum
intro: Coeloglossum viride subsp. islandicum, also known as the island green orchid or green bog orchid, is a sub-species of the green orchid native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coeloglossum viride subsp. islandicum include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Coeloglossum viride subsp. islandicum is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and traditional folk medicine.
